data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: WhatsApp uses a microservices architecture to enable modular development and easy scaling.
data.technical_spec: Services are split into individual units that handle specific tasks and communicate over APIs.

data.title: End-to-End Encryption
data.description: Messages are encrypted end-to-end to ensure user privacy.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes Signal Protocol for secure messaging.

data.title: Real-Time Communication
data.description: System is optimized for real-time communication, especially for voice and video calls.
data.technical_spec: Leverages WebRTC and reliable UDP protocols.

data.title: Data Synchronization
data.description: Ensures messages are synchronized across all user devices seamlessly.
data.technical_spec: Uses a combination of cloud-based storage and device-specific caching.

data.title: Scalability Framework
data.description: Designed to support millions of concurrent users globally.
data.technical_spec: Distributed systems architecture along with load balancing and horizontal scaling.
